sections.paragraph:
βριμάομαι (Aristoph. et al.) be indignant J 11:33 P75 for ἐμβρ., q.v.—DELG s.v. βρίμη.

Aristoph Aristoph , V–IV b.c.—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

q.v. q.v. = quod vide (which see, see that which has just been mentioned)

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 184
